description: discover a govd NODE — GET its /health + /catalog over HTTP (read-only, portable)
rules: read-only — two HTTP GETs (/health, /catalog), no mutation
pure urllib: no local cyberware dependency, so any agent can point neoclaw at any node by URL
report (node identity + governed catalog) to record_store
usage: Looks for the govd: set NODE_URL to target a node (your local node, or a FLEET node — its tailnet IP:5773 from your fleet config, NOT loopback); if unset it falls back to $GOVD_URL, else the local node http://127.0.0.1:5773. Output: discover.json — node health (service/mode/chip_sha/runs + exec_mode/exod_attached: a govd+exod body or a cooperative anchor?) + the governed catalog. Exit 0 iff reachable AND a catalog returned.
limitation: Needs a reachable govd node. Reporting only — no claim, no run.
